hero.sub: Ship agency, freight forwarding and customs brokerage — one coordinated team across all major Bulgarian ports, at any hour.

faq.q: Who are Unitrans Ltd. and Uniagent Varna Ltd.?
faq.a: Two specialised Bulgarian companies operating as one coordinated team since 1993, headquartered in Varna. Unitrans covers freight forwarding, customs brokerage and port logistics; Uniagent covers ship agency, husbandry services and ship repair coordination.

faq.q: Which Bulgarian ports do you cover?
faq.a: All major commercial ports: Varna, Burgas and Balchik on the Black Sea, and the Danube ports of Ruse, Lom, Svishtov, Vidin, Silistra, Tutrakan and Oryahovo.

faq.q: What does the ship agency service include?
faq.a: Arrival and departure formalities, vessel clearance and documentation, husbandry services, crew changes, spare parts delivery, bunkering coordination, ship repair assistance and dry-dock coordination.

faq.q: Do you handle grain and bulk cargo?
faq.a: Yes — it is our core expertise. For over three decades we have handled wheat, corn, barley, sunflower seeds, rapeseed and vegetable oils, as well as fertilisers, steel, containers, project and breakbulk cargo.

faq.q: Do you work outside standard business hours?
faq.a: Yes. Our duty teams provide coverage 365 days a year — shipping does not follow standard working hours, and neither do we.

faq.q: How do I nominate a vessel or request a quote?
faq.a: Use the contact form, write to uniagent@unitrans.bg or call +359 52 632 130. Share the port, cargo and dates — we respond quickly.
